title: Mangrove Roots
description:
Properties:
• root_decoration ({ decoration_block, decoration_blocks_sequence, decoration_chance, ... })
• max_root_width (int)

root_decoration.title: Root Decoration
root_decoration.description:
Configuration object for the root decoration.

Properties:
• decoration_block (string)
• decoration_blocks_sequence
• decoration_chance ({ numerator, denominator })
• num_steps (int)
• step_direction (string)

defaultSnippets.label: Root Decoration
defaultSnippets.description: Configuration object for the root decoration.

max_root_width.title: Max Root Width
max_root_width.description: Max width that the roots can occupy. The width increases up to the max width while moving downwards. When a max width is reached, roots will grow vertically.

above_root.title: Above Root
above_root.description: Configuration object for blocks decorating the top of the roots.
